homepage.heroSubline: Durable, beautiful floors built to last. Serving Baltimore and surrounding areas with unwavering quality and expert craftsmanship.
homepage.aboutTitle: Crafting Baltimore Floors, One Project at a Time
aboutText: NextGen Floors LLC began with a simple goal: to provide Baltimore with superior flooring solutions built to withstand the city's unique climate and architectural styles. We saw a need for reliable contractors who understood the challenges of rowhouses, waterfront properties, and everything in between.

Our approach is straightforward: meticulous preparation, skilled installation, and a commitment to using only the highest-quality materials. We believe in open communication, transparent pricing, and exceeding expectations on every project, big or small.

We're proud to be a part of the Baltimore community. We source materials locally whenever possible and actively support local initiatives. Our commitment extends beyond flooring; it's about building lasting relationships and contributing to the vitality of our city.

services.name: Hardwood Flooring
services.shortDescription: Timeless elegance and unmatched durability for your Baltimore home.
services.description:
Hardwood flooring brings warmth and sophistication to any space. At NextGen Floors LLC, we specialize in hardwood installation, refinishing, and repair, using only premium-grade materials sourced for their longevity and beauty. We understand the unique challenges of Baltimore homes – from the settling foundations of historic rowhouses to the moisture concerns near the Inner Harbor. 

Our team meticulously prepares the subfloor, ensuring a level and stable base for your hardwood. We offer a wide selection of wood species, stains, and finishes to match your style and budget. Whether you're looking for classic oak, rustic maple, or exotic Brazilian cherry, we can help you find the perfect hardwood flooring to enhance your home's value and appeal.

Baltimore's climate demands flooring that can withstand humidity fluctuations. We use advanced moisture-resistant underlayments and sealants to protect your hardwood investment and prevent warping or cupping. Our refinishing services can restore the luster of your existing hardwood floors, breathing new life into tired and worn surfaces. We handle everything from sanding and staining to applying durable topcoats that resist scratches and scuffs.

faq.question: What type of hardwood is best for Baltimore's climate?
faq.answer: Engineered hardwood is generally more resistant to moisture than solid hardwood, making it a better choice for Baltimore's humid summers. We can advise you on specific species and finishes for optimal performance.

faq.question: How often should I refinish my hardwood floors?
faq.answer: The frequency depends on foot traffic and wear. Typically, hardwood floors need refinishing every 7-10 years. We offer free assessments to determine if your floors are ready for refinishing.

faq.question: Do you offer dustless sanding?
faq.answer: Yes, we use advanced dustless sanding equipment to minimize mess and disruption during the refinishing process. This helps maintain air quality and reduces cleanup time.

services.name: Laminate Flooring
services.shortDescription: Affordable style and exceptional durability for Baltimore families.
services.description:
Laminate flooring offers a cost-effective and versatile alternative to hardwood, mimicking the look of natural wood, stone, or tile at a fraction of the price. NextGen Floors LLC provides a wide range of laminate flooring options to suit any style and budget. Ideal for Baltimore homes with active families or high-traffic areas, laminate is resistant to scratches, stains, and fading. 

We carefully select our laminate products from leading manufacturers, ensuring quality construction and realistic designs. Our installation team is experienced in handling various laminate styles, including plank, tile, and sheet options. We pay close attention to detail, ensuring precise cuts, seamless transitions, and a professional finish. Laminate flooring is particularly well-suited for basements and other areas prone to moisture, making it a smart choice for many Baltimore homes.

With proper care, laminate flooring can last for many years, providing a beautiful and durable surface that enhances your home's appeal. We offer a variety of underlayments to improve sound insulation and moisture resistance, further extending the life of your laminate floor. From traditional wood-look planks to modern stone-look tiles, we have the perfect laminate flooring solution to transform your space.

faq.question: Is laminate flooring waterproof?
faq.answer: While laminate is water-resistant, it's not fully waterproof. We recommend using waterproof laminate options in areas prone to spills or moisture, such as bathrooms and kitchens. We can guide you through the best options for your needs.

faq.question: How do I clean laminate flooring?
faq.answer: Laminate flooring is easy to clean with a damp mop and a mild detergent. Avoid using excessive water or harsh chemicals, as these can damage the surface. We can provide specific cleaning recommendations based on the type of laminate you choose.

faq.question: Can laminate flooring be installed over existing floors?
faq.answer: In many cases, yes. However, the existing floor must be level and in good condition. We will assess your subfloor to determine if it's suitable for laminate installation.

services.name: Vinyl Flooring
services.shortDescription: Waterproof, stylish, and budget-friendly flooring for Baltimore living.
services.description:
Vinyl flooring offers exceptional versatility and durability, making it a popular choice for kitchens, bathrooms, and other high-moisture areas in Baltimore homes. NextGen Floors LLC provides a wide selection of vinyl flooring options, including sheet vinyl, vinyl tiles, and luxury vinyl planks (LVP). With its waterproof construction and realistic designs, vinyl flooring combines practicality with aesthetic appeal.

Our team is experienced in installing all types of vinyl flooring, ensuring a seamless and watertight finish. We pay close attention to detail, properly preparing the subfloor and using high-quality adhesives to prevent lifting or bubbling. Vinyl flooring is particularly well-suited for basements, laundry rooms, and other areas prone to moisture damage.

Luxury vinyl planks (LVP) offer the look and feel of hardwood or stone with the added benefits of waterproof construction and easy maintenance. We carry a wide range of LVP styles, including wood-look planks, stone-look tiles, and decorative patterns. With its durable wear layer and realistic textures, LVP is a great choice for active families and pet owners. From traditional styles to modern designs, we have the perfect vinyl flooring solution to transform your space.

faq.question: Is vinyl flooring suitable for basements?
faq.answer: Yes, vinyl flooring is an excellent choice for basements due to its waterproof construction and resistance to mold and mildew. We recommend using a moisture barrier underlayment for added protection.

faq.question: How do I maintain vinyl flooring?
faq.answer: Vinyl flooring is easy to maintain with regular sweeping and mopping. Use a mild detergent and avoid harsh chemicals or abrasive cleaners. We can provide specific cleaning recommendations based on the type of vinyl you choose.

faq.question: What is the difference between vinyl sheet and vinyl plank?
faq.answer: Vinyl sheet comes in large rolls, providing a seamless and watertight surface. Vinyl plank comes in individual planks that click together, offering a more realistic wood or stone look. Both options are durable and waterproof, but vinyl plank is generally more expensive.

services.name: Tile Flooring
services.shortDescription: Durable, elegant, and waterproof tile solutions for Baltimore homes.
services.description:
Tile flooring offers unparalleled durability, versatility, and aesthetic appeal, making it a popular choice for kitchens, bathrooms, and entryways in Baltimore homes. NextGen Floors LLC specializes in tile installation, repair, and replacement, using only premium-grade materials and expert craftsmanship. We understand the unique challenges of Baltimore's diverse architectural styles, from the Victorian-era charm of Federal Hill to the modern aesthetics of the Inner Harbor.

Our team is experienced in installing all types of tile, including ceramic, porcelain, stone, and glass. We pay close attention to detail, ensuring precise cuts, level surfaces, and proper grout lines. Tile flooring is particularly well-suited for high-moisture areas, such as bathrooms and kitchens, where its waterproof construction and easy maintenance make it an ideal choice.

We offer a wide range of tile styles, colors, and patterns to suit any taste and budget. From classic subway tile to modern mosaic designs, we can help you create a stunning and durable tile floor that enhances your home's value and appeal. Our team can also handle custom tile installations, including backsplashes, shower surrounds, and fireplace facades. With proper care, tile flooring can last for decades, providing a beautiful and functional surface that withstands the test of time.

faq.question: What is the best type of tile for a bathroom floor?
faq.answer: Porcelain tile is generally considered the best choice for bathroom floors due to its waterproof properties and durability. Ceramic tile is also a good option, but it's slightly less water-resistant. Natural stone tile can be used, but it requires sealing to prevent water damage.

faq.question: How do I clean tile flooring?
faq.answer: Tile flooring is easy to clean with regular sweeping and mopping. Use a mild detergent and avoid harsh chemicals or abrasive cleaners. We recommend sealing grout lines periodically to prevent staining and water damage.

faq.question: Can tile be installed over existing flooring?
faq.answer: In some cases, yes. However, the existing floor must be level, stable, and in good condition. We will assess your subfloor to determine if it's suitable for tile installation.

services.name: Floor Repair
services.shortDescription: Reliable floor repair services to restore the beauty and safety of your Baltimore home.
services.description:
Don't let damaged floors detract from the beauty and safety of your Baltimore home. NextGen Floors LLC offers comprehensive floor repair services to address a wide range of issues, from water damage and cracked tiles to loose planks and uneven surfaces. We understand the unique challenges of repairing floors in older Baltimore homes, including settling foundations, moisture problems, and outdated materials.

Our team is experienced in repairing all types of flooring, including hardwood, laminate, vinyl, and tile. We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to restore your floors to their original condition. Whether you need a few cracked tiles replaced, a section of damaged hardwood repaired, or an entire floor leveled, we have the expertise to get the job done right.

We begin with a thorough assessment of the damage, identifying the underlying cause and developing a customized repair plan. Our goal is to provide lasting solutions that not only fix the immediate problem but also prevent future issues. We work closely with our clients to ensure their satisfaction and provide clear, upfront pricing.

faq.question: How do I know if my floor needs repair?
faq.answer: Common signs of floor damage include cracks, chips, loose tiles, warped planks, water stains, and uneven surfaces. If you notice any of these issues, it's important to address them promptly to prevent further damage.

faq.question: Can you match the existing flooring during a repair?
faq.answer: Yes, we make every effort to match the existing flooring as closely as possible. We have access to a wide range of materials and can often source replacement tiles or planks that are nearly identical to the original.

faq.question: How long does floor repair take?
faq.answer: The duration of floor repair depends on the extent of the damage and the type of flooring. Simple repairs, such as replacing a few cracked tiles, can often be completed in a few hours. More extensive repairs may take a day or two.

services.name: Subfloor Services
services.shortDescription: Expert subfloor leveling and repairs for a sturdy, lasting foundation.
services.description:
A solid subfloor is the unsung hero of any successful flooring installation. Without a properly leveled and structurally sound subfloor, even the most beautiful hardwood, tile, or vinyl flooring will eventually succumb to problems like squeaks, cracks, and unevenness. NextGen Floors LLC provides comprehensive subfloor services to ensure a stable and durable foundation for your new or existing floors in the Baltimore area.

We specialize in addressing the unique challenges posed by Baltimore's older homes, many of which have uneven or damaged subfloors due to settling, moisture, or age. Our team is skilled in leveling subfloors, repairing damaged joists, and installing new subfloor panels to create a smooth and solid base for your finished flooring.

Whether you're planning a new flooring installation or simply need to address existing subfloor problems, we have the expertise to get the job done right. We use advanced leveling techniques and high-quality materials to ensure a long-lasting and trouble-free result.

faq.question: Why is subfloor preparation important?
faq.answer: Proper subfloor preparation is crucial for ensuring the longevity and performance of your finished flooring. An uneven or damaged subfloor can lead to a variety of problems, including squeaks, cracks, and unevenness.

faq.question: How do you level a subfloor?
faq.answer: We use a variety of leveling techniques, including self-leveling compounds, shims, and plywood overlays, to create a smooth and level surface. The best method depends on the specific conditions of your subfloor.

faq.question: What are the signs of subfloor damage?
faq.answer: Common signs of subfloor damage include squeaky floors, soft spots, uneven surfaces, and visible cracks. You may also notice musty odors or signs of moisture damage.

serviceAreas.content: Proudly serving Baltimore and surrounding communities.

reviews.name: Maria S.
reviews.text: NextGen Floors transformed our living room with beautiful new hardwood. The team was professional, efficient, and paid great attention to detail. They even helped us choose the perfect stain to match our existing furniture. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: David B.
reviews.text: We needed an affordable flooring solution for our basement, and NextGen Floors delivered. The laminate looks great, and the installation was quick and clean. There was a small delay due to material availability, but they communicated clearly throughout the process.

reviews.name: Jessica L.
reviews.text: The team at NextGen Floors did an amazing job on our bathroom renovation. The tile work is flawless, and they were very helpful in guiding us through the design process. The installers were respectful of our home and cleaned up thoroughly after each day.

reviews.name: Robert K.
reviews.text: We had some water damage in our kitchen, and NextGen Floors came to the rescue. They quickly assessed the damage and repaired the affected area, matching the existing hardwood perfectly. Their prompt service saved us from a much bigger problem.

reviews.name: Susan P.
reviews.text: NextGen Floors installed vinyl flooring in our sunroom, and we're very happy with the results. The floor looks great, and it's so easy to clean. The installation team was professional and courteous, but the initial quote was slightly lower than the final price due to unforeseen subfloor issues. Overall a good experience.

reviews.name: Michael T.
reviews.text: Our hardwood floors were looking dull and scratched after years of wear and tear. NextGen Floors refinished them beautifully, bringing back their original luster. The dustless sanding system was a huge plus! Our floors look brand new again.
